task_description: 对MIMIR-Core的Feature_003（安全与监控：围栏/观自在/权限/审计）进行完整检测和执行

matched_roles.name: Sprint Prioritizer
matched_roles.description: Expert product manager specializing in agile sprint planning, feature prioritization, and resource allocation. Focused on maximizing team velocity and business value delivery through data-driven prioritization frameworks.
matched_roles.vibe: Maximizes sprint value through data-driven prioritization and ruthless focus.

matched_roles.name: TikTok Strategist
matched_roles.description: Expert TikTok marketing specialist focused on viral content creation, algorithm optimization, and community building. Masters TikTok's unique culture and features for brand growth.
matched_roles.vibe: Rides the algorithm and builds community through authentic TikTok culture.

matched_roles.name: AI Engineer
matched_roles.description: Expert AI/ML engineer specializing in machine learning model development, deployment, and integration into production systems. Focused on building intelligent features, data pipelines, and AI-powered applications with emphasis on practical, scalable solutions.
matched_roles.vibe: Turns ML models into production features that actually scale.

matched_roles.name: Experiment Tracker
matched_roles.description: Expert project manager specializing in experiment design, execution tracking, and data-driven decision making. Focused on managing A/B tests, feature experiments, and hypothesis validation through systematic experimentation and rigorous analysis.
matched_roles.vibe: Designs experiments, tracks results, and lets the data decide.
